name: glucosense-workspace
description: Integrated stack: npm run fullstack → scripts/start-integrated.ps1 (3 windows). Single-terminal: npm run start:full:concurrent

scripts.start:full:clean: npm run ports:free && npm run integrated
scripts.start:full:concurrent: concurrently -k -n meal-api,glucosense,meal-web -c green,blue,magenta "npm run _meal-api" "npm run _glucosense" "npm run _meal-web"
scripts._meal-api: cd Meal-Plan-System/backend && set MEAL_UVICORN_RELOAD=0&& set PORT=8001&& python run.py
scripts._glucosense: cd Clinical-Insulin-Recommendation/frontend && set GLUCOSENSE_UVICORN_RELOAD=0&& npm run dev:fast
scripts.start:full:reload: concurrently -k -n meal-api,glucosense,meal-web -c green,blue,magenta "npm run _meal-api" "npm run _glucosense-reload" "npm run _meal-web"
